title: The Most Important Gates in Quantum Computing Explained
summary: IBM Technology video explaining core quantum computing gates including Hadamard and CNOT gates, with discussion of qubits, superposition, and entanglement. Covers how quantum gates shape quantum circuits and their foundational importance to quantum computation.
